summary.zh: 内容进入视口时触发一次轻量展示，并支持减少动态偏好。
summary.en: Reveal content once as it enters the viewport with a reduced-motion fallback.

definition.zh: 元素进入视口时淡入或滑动到位。
definition.en: Viewport entry triggers a one-time opacity or position transition for newly visible content.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 在内容首次进入视口时提示新的阅读区块，并保持页面滚动连续。
purpose.en: Signal a new reading section on first viewport entry while preserving scroll continuity.

frequency.zh: 每个内容块最多触发一次；长页面仅选择具有结构意义的节点。
frequency.en: Trigger each section at most once and select only structurally meaningful nodes on long pages.

trigger.zh: 由 IntersectionObserver 达到阈值触发，页面加载时已可见内容立即呈现。
trigger.en: Trigger from an IntersectionObserver threshold, showing initially visible content immediately.

enterExit.zh: 进入采用短位移和淡入；滚出视口后保持稳定，避免反复隐藏。
enterExit.en: Enter with brief travel and fade, then remain stable after leaving the viewport.

interruptibility.zh: 快速滚动时直接完成当前揭示，避免队列堆积。
interruptibility.en: Complete the current reveal during fast scrolling to avoid animation queues.

gestureRules.zh: 滚动本身保持原生；揭示动画不能劫持滚轮、触摸或键盘滚动。
gestureRules.en: Keep scrolling native and never capture wheel, touch, or keyboard scroll input for the reveal.

reducedMotion.zh: 内容进入视口时立即显示，或只保留一次极短淡入。
reducedMotion.en: Show content immediately on viewport entry or keep one very brief fade.

reviewNotes.zh: 禁用 JavaScript 时内容仍应可见。
reviewNotes.en: Keep content visible when JavaScript is unavailable.

reviewNotes.zh: 避免首屏关键内容等待 observer 回调。
reviewNotes.en: Do not make critical above-the-fold content wait for an observer callback.
